approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The deeper, clearer, and smoother the heart line, the better the person's relationships, health, and emotional well-being will be.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed heart line indicates a person with strong emotional connections, good health, and a compassionate nature.

approved.original: इसके विपरीत यदि रेखा अल्पष्ट, कटी-फटी, धुमिल हो ती व्यक्ति भावना-शुन्य होगा, तथा उसका जीवन दुघंटनाओं पते श्रूर्ण होगा | ऐसा व्यक्ति नाजुक-मिजाज़, बात-बात पर क्ोधित होने वाला तथा अल्पायु होगा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: On the other hand, if the heart line is unclear, fragmented, and dull, the person will be emotionally numb, and their life will be marked by struggles.
approved.what_it_means: A poorly developed heart line suggests a person with emotional instability, a short temper, and a tendency to struggle in life.

approved.original: जीवन-रेखा जिन-जिन पर्वतों पर से होकर जाती है. उन-उत पर्वेतों की स्थितियाँ देखकर बीमारी बताई जा सकतो है तथा जिस स्थान से रेखा कटी हुई या धुमिल हो, उन वर्षों मे एक्सीडेंट अथवा बीमारी का योग हो, ऐसा समझना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: In palmistry, the life line can be used to determine the likelihood of illness or accidents based on the mountains it passes through and the areas where it is broken or dull.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's susceptibility to accidents or illnesses, particularly in specific years or periods of their life.

approved.original: यदि गुरु-पर्वत के नीचे जोवन-रेखा और मस्तिष्क-रेखा मिली हुई हो, तो यह शुभ चिह्न माना गया है ये दोनों जितनी ही अधिक मिली हुई होती है, व्यक्ति उतना ही अधिक सतऊ, परिश्रमी और योजनावद्ध कार्य करनेवाला होता है, परन्तु यदि ये दोनों रेखाएं उद्गम-स्थल पर अलग-अलग हो तो व्यक्त स्त्रतत्र कार्य करतेवाला, * अपनी ही धुन में रहनेवाला तथा उन्मुक्त विचारों का स्वामी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the life line and head line intersect at the guru mount, it is considered a auspicious sign, indicating the person's increased diligence, hard work, and planning skills.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests a person with strong leadership qualities, a disciplined approach to work, and a tendency to be focused and independent.

approved.original: यदि किसो हाथ में जीवन-रेखा, मस्तिष्क-रेखा भौर हृदय-रेसा दीनों ही उद्गम-स्यत्त पर मिली हुई द्वों, तो यह एक दु्मागपाृर्ण
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the life line, head line, and heart line intersect at the same point, it is considered an inauspicious sign.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person with a complex and potentially challenging life, marked by conflicts and difficulties.

approved.original: जीवन-रेखा पर यदि आड़ी लकीरें हों, जो उसनो काटती हों तो व्यवित का स्वास्थ्य उसका साथ नहीं देता स(यकदि आीड़र ें मिल- पिन बसा व हो व्यसस ास की तकीनों कोकम िलाकर एक बना ले, तोव ्यक्तिद म और फेफड़ों गी
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there are horizontal lines on the life line, cutting it, the person's health will not cooperate with them.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests a person with health issues that may be resistant to treatment or require ongoing care.

approved.original: यर्दि जीवन-रेखा से फटकर कोई लहरियादार रेखा बुध-पर्वत की ओर जाती दिखाई दे, तो व्यक्ति कंसर का मरीज होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a wavy line breaks off from the life line and moves towards the Mercury mount, the person is a cancer patient.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person with a high risk of cancer, particularly if the wavy line is prominent and well-defined.

approved.original: यदि जीवन-रेखा से कोई शाखा निकलकर गुरु-पर्वंत की भोर जा रही हो तो व्यक्ति में बहुत अधिक महत्त्वाकांक्षाएं होती हैंतथा उन्हें पृर ा करने के लिए निरन्तर प्रयत्व करता रहता ह
approved.simple_explanation: If a branch from the Life Line goes towards the Mount of Jupiter, it indicates a person with high ambitions and a strong desire to achieve their goals.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's drive, ambition, and determination to succeed in life.

approved.original: यदि जोवन-रेखा प्र कई भ्रश्ाखाएँ ऊपर की ओर उठती हृष्टियोचर हों, तो व्यक्ति करें होता है, तथा साधारण घराने में भी जन्म लेकर श्रेष्ठ, धवी और योग्य पुरुष बनता ह
approved.simple_explanation: If the Life Line has many branches rising upwards, it indicates a person who is destined to become great, even if born in a simple family.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for greatness and their ability to rise above their circumstances.

approved.original: ये प्रशाखाएँ जीवन-रेखा में जिस ध्यान पर मिनें, वह स्पान था आयुखण्ड व्यक्ति कलेि ए सौभाग्यशाली होता ह
approved.simple_explanation: The branches of the Life Line indicate the areas of life where a person will be fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the areas of life where a person will experience good fortune and success.

approved.original: आयु के उन वर्षो में व्यक्ति असाधारण कार्य कर ऊँचा उठता ह
approved.simple_explanation: In those years of their life, a person will perform extraordinary work and rise to great heights.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for greatness and their ability to achieve remarkable things in life.

approved.original: जीवन-रेखा से निकलकर जो प्रशाखा जिस पर्वत की ओर बढ़ती है, उस पर्वत के विश्येष भुण व्यक्ति में विशेष रूप से पाये जाते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: The branch from the Life Line that goes towards a particular mount indicates the presence of its characteristics in the person.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's inherent traits and characteristics, as indicated by the mount they are connected to.

approved.original: यदि जीवन-रेखा प्रारम्भ से हो अपनी सहायक रेखा लेकर घल रही हो, तो ऐसा व्यक्ति महत्त्वपूर्ण, सोच-समझकर योजनाएँ बनाने* वाला, तथा तदनुरूप अपने जीवन को ढालनेवाला, चतुर तथा कल्पता- शील होता ह
approved.simple_explanation: If the Life Line begins with its support line, it indicates a person who is intelligent, strategic, and skilled in planning their life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's ability to plan and manage their life effectively, making them intelligent and resourceful.

approved.original: ऐसे व्यक्ति केलि ए इस जीवन में कुछ भी असंम्भव नही होता | यदि जीवन-रेखा उद्गम-स्थल से अकेली चली हो, भोर कुछ आगे चलकर उसके साथ सहायक रेखा चल पड़ी हो, तो जिस बिग्दु सेसह ायक रेखा प्रारम्भ हुई है, जीवन की उस आयु से व्यक्ति का भाग्योदय होगा, ऐसा समझना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Such a person can achieve anything in this life. If the Life Line begins alone and is later accompanied by a support line, it indicates the person's destiny will unfold from that point onwards.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for success and their ability to overcome any obstacle in life.

approved.original: हु जीवन-रेखा की अचानक समाप्ति व्यक्ति की आकस्मिक मृत्यु की ओर सकेत करती है
approved.simple_explanation: The sudden termination of the Life Line indicates a person's accidental death.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's risk of sudden and unexpected death, often due to accidents or unforeseen circumstances.

approved.original: यदि जीवन-रेखा में शनि-रेखा आकर मिल रही ही तो व्यक्त मननध्ील और तेजस्वी होगा
approved.simple_explanation: If the Jupiter Line meets the Saturn Line, the person will be thoughtful and brilliant.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person with a sharp mind and great potential.

approved.original: रही हो तो व्यक्ति उच्चपदासीन होगा, बुध-रेंखा आकर मिल रही हो तो ध्यक्ति सफल व्यापारी, वक्ता और धनी होया, और यदि मंगल- रेखा आकर मिल रही हो तो व्यक्तित सेना या पुलिस में श्रेष्ठ पद प्राप्त कर यशोवर्द्धक कार्य करेगा
approved.simple_explanation: If the Mercury Line meets, the person will be in a high position, successful in business, a skilled orator, and wealthy. If the Mars Line meets, they will achieve a high position in the army or police and perform commendable work.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person with great business acumen, excellent communication skills, and a strong sense of duty.

approved.original: जीवन-रेखा का अन्तिम स्थल भी सावधानीपूर्वक दखना घाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: The end of the Life Line should be carefully examined.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates the importance of examining the end of one's life journey.

approved.original: यदि जीवन-रेथा के अन्त में क्रॉस, नक्षत्र या बिन्दु हो तो व्यक्ति की मृत्यु अधानक होती है
approved.simple_explanation: If there is a cross, star, or dot at the end of the Life Line, the person's death will be sudden.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person whose life may be cut short unexpectedly.

approved.original: यदि जीवन-रेखा अन्त तक णजाते-जाते कई घाराओ में बट जाय, तो व्यक्ति बुढ़ापे मे क्षय रोग से पीड़ित होगा
approved.simple_explanation: If the Life Line breaks into several branches before reaching the end, the person will be affected by wasting diseases in old age.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may suffer from degenerative diseases in their old age.

approved.original: यदि जीवन-रेखा सफेद-सी होत ो व्यक्ति रें निराशावादी भावना जरूरत से ज्यादा होती है, गुलाबी रंग की जीवन-रैखा स्वस्थता की परिधायक है, गहरो लाल रेखा शक्ति और सामर्थ्यं की प्रतीक है तो पोली रेखाएँ विभिन्‍न बीमारियों को व्यवत्त करती हैं, नीली रेखानं से निमित जीवन-रेखा रवत-संचार में दोष स्पष्ट करती है
approved.simple_explanation: If the Life Line is white, the person will have excessive pessimistic feelings. A pink Life Line indicates good health, a deep red line represents power and strength, and polka dots indicate various diseases. A blue line indicates disorders in blood circulation.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person's emotional state, health, and potential for strength or weakness.

approved.original: प्रभावक किरणें--पे किरणें वाल की तरह मद्दोत गौर सख्या में अधिक द्वोती हैं,ज ोकि या तो जीवन-रेखा से निकलती हैं, या शुक्र- पव॑त से प्रारम्भ होती हैं, अषवा दोनों ही स्थानों से तिकलती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Influential rays, like the rays emanating from the Life Line or the Venus Mount, are more prominent in a person's aura, emerging from either place.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person with a strong aura and potential for influence.

approved.original: यद्यपि ये रेदाएँ अधिक स्पष्ट नद्दी होतीं, फिर भो इनका सूक्ष्म अध्य- यन अत्यन्त आवश्यक है
approved.simple_explanation: Although these lines are more visible, it is still essential to examine them in detail.
approved.what_it_means: This emphasizes the importance of a thorough examination of the lines.

approved.original: गदि ये रेखाएँ विवाह-रेखा को काट दें तो व्यक्ति तलाक देता है, या जीवन* भर मनमुठाव बना रद्वता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If these lines cut the Marriage Line, the person gets divorced or has a lifelong troubled marriage. This indicates a lack of harmony and understanding in relationships.
approved.what_it_means: A break in the Marriage Line reveals a troubled or unhappy marriage, often due to misunderstandings or a lack of harmony.

approved.original: ५ मणियध रेखाएं--कलाई प्र दो, सीन था घार वृत्ताकाररेयाएँ दिखाई देती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Five circular lines on the wrist are seen. This is a common feature.
approved.what_it_means: The presence of circular lines on the Mount of Moon indicates a calm and gentle nature, often with a strong connection to emotions and intuition.

approved.original: यदि ये रेखाएं स्पष्ट, गहरी और सुडौल हों, तो व्यवित को यश, मान, पद, प्रतिष्ठा आदि सहज सुलभ होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: If these lines are clear, deep, and well-defined, the person easily achieves success, respect, and prestige.
approved.what_it_means: A clear and well-defined Success Line reveals a person who is destined for success, respect, and prestige, often with a strong sense of ambition and drive.

approved.original: परन्तु यदि कटी-फटी सणिबंध-रेखा हो तो व्यक्ति की प्रगति रुक जाती है; तथा उसे काफी सघर्षों कास ामना करना पड़ता है
approved.simple_explanation: However, if the Progress Line is broken, the person's progress is hindered; and they face many hardships.
approved.what_it_means: A broken Progress Line indicates a person who faces many obstacles and hardships, often hindering their progress and success.

approved.original: मणियंध्र से यदि कुछ रेखाएँ चन्द्र-पर्वंत की ओर जाती दिसाई दें, तो वे रेखाएं यात्रा-रेखाएँ कहलाती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If some lines from the Mount of Moon are seen going towards the lunar mount, they are called travel lines.
approved.what_it_means: The presence of Travel Lines indicates a person who is destined for frequent travel, often for work or personal reasons, and may have a strong connection to foreign lands and cultures.

approved.original: ये रेखाएँ जितनी लम्बी होंगी, व्यक्तित की यात्राएँ भी उतनी ही लम्बी और काफी होंगी
approved.simple_explanation: The longer these lines are, the longer and more frequent the person's travels will be.
approved.what_it_means: The length of the Travel Line reveals the extent and frequency of a person's travels, often indicating a life of adventure and exploration.

approved.original: यदि इन रेखाओ के मार्ग में एक या कई द्वीप हों, तो व्यक्षित को प्रेम के क्षेत्र में अपमान सहन करना पड़ता है
approved.simple_explanation: If there are islands in the path of these lines, the person suffers humiliation in the love department.
approved.what_it_means: An island in the Life Line reveals a person who may experience heartbreak, rejection, or humiliation in their romantic relationships.

approved.original: यदि प्रभावक रेखाएँ सूर्य-रेया को काट दें, तो व्यवित की प्रतिप्ठा कोघ क्का पहुँचता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the influential lines cut the Sun Line, the person's reputation is affected.
approved.what_it_means: A break in the Sun Line reveals a person who may experience a loss of reputation, often due to their own mistakes or the actions of others.

approved.original: यदि कोई रेखा मणिवंध से तिकलकर चन्दन-य्वंत पर से होती हुई धनि-क्षेत्र कओीर जावे तो व्यक्ति की मृत्यु यात्राकाल मे ही हो जाती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a line branches from the Mount of Mercury and passes through the Mount of Venus, then the person's death occurs during travel.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may meet an untimely death while traveling.

approved.original: यदि ऐसी रेखा सूर्य-क्षेत्र कीओर जावे तो उच्च पद तथा प्रतिष्ठा मिलती है, त्तथा यदि ऐसी रेखा बुध-पर्वत की जोर जाती होत ो व्यक्ति को आकस्मिक द्रव्यलाभ होता ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If such a line goes towards the Mount of Sun, then one gets high position and prestige, and if such a line goes towards the Mount of Mercury, then one gets sudden wealth.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person who may attain high social status and experience unexpected financial gains.

approved.original: मंगल-रेखा--मिम्न मंगलीय पर्वत सनेि कलकर जो जीवन-रेखा के समानान्तर चलती है, वह मंगल-रेखा कहलाती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The line that runs parallel to the Life Line, starting from the lower part of the Mount of Mars, is called the Mars Line.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may have a strong desire for action and adventure.

approved.original: यदि यह रेखा स्पष्ठ होकर जीवन-रेखा के साथ-साथ जाती हो, तो , जीवन-रेफा को बल मिलता है ठथा उसका जीवन घनी, प्रतिष्ठायुक्त तथा हेश्वयंशाली होता ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If this line is clear and runs parallel to the Life Line, then the Life Line gets strength, and his life becomes dense, prestigious, and prosperous.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person who may lead a fulfilling, respected, and prosperous life.

approved.original: मंगल-रेखा गुद-्पर्दत की ओर जा रही हो, तो व्यक्ति कई महत्त्वाकांक्षाएँ रखता है, तथा उन्हें पूरी करने को प्रथत्नशील रहती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars Line goes towards the Mount of Saturn, then the person has many ambitions and remains determined to fulfill them.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may have many goals and ambitions, and remain driven to achieve them.

approved.original: ग्रदि मंगल-रेखा भाग्य-रेखा से मिले तो सफलता का चिह्न समझना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars Line meets the Destiny Line, then it is a sign of success.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person who may experience success and achievement in their life.

approved.original: चन्द्र-पर्वंद की ओर जाती हुई मंगल-रेथा व्यग्िति ह्ड
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mars Line that goes towards the Mount of Moon is a sign of distraction.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may be easily distracted and lack focus.

approved.original: जीवन-रेखा पर कुछ और विचार १. यदि ऊित्तो व्यक्ति के हाथ में जीवन-रेखा आद्योपान्त लहर-दर होकर चन रही हो तो व्यक्ति वंश-परम्परागत रोग से 'पीड़ित होगा तथा जीवन-भर चिस्तातुर रहेग
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Life Line is wavy from the beginning in a person's hand, then the person will be affected by hereditary diseases and remain weak throughout life.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may be prone to inherited health issues and may remain weak throughout their life.

approved.page: [page 96] २. यदि जीवन-रेया प्रारम्भिक स्थल पर दिजिल्ली अथवा बहु- जिद्वी बन रही हो, तो व्यक्ति उदर रोग से पीड़ित रहता ह)
approved.original: यदि जीवन-रेया प्रारम्भिक स्थल पर दिजिल्ली अथवा बहु- जिद्वी बन रही हो, तो व्यक्ति उदर रोग से पीड़ित रहता ह
approved.simple_explanation: A person with a Life Line that forms islands or channels at the beginning may be prone to stomach problems. This can indicate digestive issues or other health concerns related to the stomach.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests that the person may struggle with stomach problems or digestive issues throughout their life, affecting their overall health and well-being.

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the Bhagyakal period, one experiences only hardships. Education is wasted, exam results are uncertain, and love is not found at home. If a Bhagyakal line is present with a Rahu line, the person regrets their own mistakes.

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: One does not get the right opportunity, resulting in a hard struggle for progress in life.

approved.simple_explanation: Crossings of the destiny line indicate a person's life will experience multiple ups and downs.

approved.original: ह श्र स्त्वास्थ्य-रेस्ता मानव-जीवन में घन, मान, पद, प्रतिष्ठा और ऐश्वर्य से भी स्वास्थ्य फो अधिक महत्त्व दिया गया है, बयोंकि यदि व्यक्ति के पास समस्त सुख और ऐहवर्य है, परन्तु वह रुग्ण है, तोउस के लिए यह सब घन, मान और ऐश्वर्य ध्यर्थ है
approved.simple_explanation: The health line is given more importance than wealth, status, and prestige because even if a person has all material comforts, poor health makes them worthless.

approved.original: म ानब फी हपेसी मेंस दसे पहले जीवन का महृत्तत हैज ौर उसके बाद ही स्वास्थ्य का महत्त्व है, इसलिए जीवन-रेखा के बाद ही स्वास्थ्य-रेसा का सुबार दर्शन, परीक्षण और अध्ययन अत्यन्त आवश्यक है

approved.original: कई बार स्वास्थ्य- रेखा बुध-पवंत पर नही भी पहुँच पाती ; ऐसी दशा मे एक बात का ध्यान रखता चाहिए नजििस रे खायाउउ ददग्मय मइ हथनेली केि नमीीचेप ेकके भेमागा ग अप मरीद : जो सिवाब ुरतु पटप रवीी हहो,ो यय ााज ज ि तका अुफाय बूघ-पर्वत को ओर हा, यह स्वास्प्य-रंखा कहताने की अधि- कारी ह

approved.original: ऐसी रंखाएं ऊई बार मत्तिष्क-रेखा के पास, ती कई बार द्वृदय-रेंखा के पास ही आकर झक जाती हैं, हाँ, उनका भुकाव अवश्य चुध-पर्वत की बोर होता ह

approved.simple_explanation: If the Mount of Moon is prominent, the person is emotional, sensitive, and often attracted to women. If the Mount of Venus is prominent, the person is successful in romantic relationships.

approved.original: उसके जीवन में स्त्रियों कोकम ी नही रहती, तथा वह सभी के साथ सहभोग कर आनन्द लूटने में समर्थ होता ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person has no female relationships in their life, they are able to enjoy relationships with everyone. They are able to connect with people of all kinds and enjoy their company.

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Love Lines are close to the Heart Line, a person will experience romantic events at a young age. If the Love Lines are far from the Heart Line, these events will occur later in life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates the timing of romantic events in a person's life. If the Love Lines are close to the Heart Line, they will experience romantic events at a young age. If they are far, these events will occur later in life.

approved.original: यदि इस प्रकार की छोट-छोटी प्रणय-रेखाएँ न हों, तो व्यक्ति संयभी हीते हैं, तथा अधिक कामेच्छ नही होते

approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for deep and long-lasting romantic relationships. It suggests that they are committed to their partners and value their relationships.

approved.original: इसके विपरीत यदि ये प्रणय-रेखाएँ सेकरी, सूक्ष्म तथा छोटी होती हैं, तो व्यक्त के प्रणय-पम्बन्ध भी बम काने तक ही रहते हैं

approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's optimistic and romantic nature. It suggests that they are always looking for love and relationships and are open to new experiences.

approved.original: यदि प्रणय-रेखा पर फ्रॉस का चिह्न हो तो व्यक्ति का प्रेम बीष में ही टूट जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there is a frost mark on the Pranaaya Rekhaa, the person's love will break in a storm.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a tumultuous love life, prone to sudden breakups and heartaches.

approved.original: यदि प्रषय-रेणा आगे जाकर दो शासाओं में वंट जाय, तो व्यक्ति का प्रणम-सम्व्ध बीच में ही मंग हो जाता है | प्रणय-रेखा में सेयद ि * कोई रंसा निकलकर नीचे की ओर जा रही हो तो व्यक्ति का वैवाहिक या प्रणयी णोवन दु.खदायो होता है

approved.what_it_means: This indicates a relationship that will end in heartache and sorrow, or a person who will face unhappy relationships due to their own negative tendencies.

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Pranaaya Rekhaa breaks in the middle, it should be understood as a separation of relationships.

approved.original: विवाह-रेखा : कुछ नवीन तथ्य-- १--यदि विवाह-रंखा कनिष्टिका उंगली के तीसरे या दूसरे पोरुए पर घढ़े तो व्यवित आजीवन कुंआरा ही रहेगा, ऐसा समझना चाहिए

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The part of the Marriage Line that touches the Heart Line indicates the year of marriage.
approved.what_it_means: The Marriage Line reveals the person's marital life and relationships. It indicates the challenges and opportunities they will face in their romantic life.

approved.original: एत्रा स्र्रा ाह्लि ास्रा स्रास्रा ाह्लि ास्रा स्रास्रा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Sun Mount and the Sun Line also need to be marked. This is done by dividing the distance between the Sun Line and the Heart Line into twelve equal parts.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates the person's creative energy, willpower, and leadership abilities. They may have a strong desire for independence and self-expression.

approved.original: स्रास्रा ाह्लि प ास्रा स्रास्रा ास्रा स्रास्रा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: From the end of the Sun Line, mark a point, then mark another point on the Heart Line, and divide the distance between them into twelve equal parts.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals the person's emotional depth, capacity for love, and ability to form strong relationships. They may have a strong connection to their heart and intuition.

approved.original: स्रास्रा ाह्लि प ास्रा स्रास्रा ास्रा स्रास्रा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The point marked at the end of the Sun Line should be considered as the month of April, then the next point as May, and so on, counting the months in this way.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates the person's ability to plan and organize their life, making decisions based on their intuition and inner wisdom.

approved.original: स्रा स्रास्रा ाह्लि स्रा स्रास्रा ास्रा स्रास्रा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: From the Sun Line, the month in which the Marriage Line crosses it should be carefully calculated, and the date should be determined.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals the person's ability to form long-term commitments and build strong relationships. They may have a strong desire for partnership and companionship.

approved.original: स्रा स्रास्रा ाह्लि स्रा स्रास्रा ास्रा स्रास्रा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: For example, if the Marriage Line crosses the Sun Line between the eleventh and twelfth points, then the calculation from the month of April will be eleven months later, which will be February, and it is clear that the marriage will be in February or March.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates the person's ability to navigate complex relationships and make decisions based on their intuition and inner wisdom.

approved.original: ह्रा स्रा ाह्लि ाह्लि नारा स्रा स्रास्रा

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This ring is not considered auspicious because people with this type of line are mostly detached from the world.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a tendency to be detached from the world, often leading to a lack of connection with others and the world around them.

approved.original: राशामघवा्यनक् ति होगएेकहान ्तपै्रिऔय, रचियस ्तोनशी मल, मसंसा र यवे उेउदया सचीीन न और निराश्ाप्रधान होता है, ओर यदि धनिवल्य-ररेेखखाा हहोो ततोो उपयुकक ्त्े तगगु णुोंण ोंककी ाववद ्धि ाड हहोीहह ो ोतती ीहह ै
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a Rahu Line is often prone to anxiety, depression, and disappointment. They may struggle with self-doubt and lack of confidence.
approved.what_it_means: This line reveals a person's tendency to be anxious, depressed, and disappointed, often struggling with self-doubt and lack of confidence.

approved.original: यह रेखा सूर्य के उत्तम प्रभावों को भी न्‍्यून कर देती है
approved.simple_explanation: This line reduces the positive effects of the Sun.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates that the person's positive qualities are diminished, leading to a lack of confidence and motivation.

approved.original: यदि अद्धंचद्वाकार की तरह मध्यमा और अनामिका के दीच में सेति कलकर रवि-पर्वत को घेरती हुई अना- मिका और कनिष्ठिका के बीच में जाकर रेखा समाप्त होती है, तो रवि-मुद्रा यार विवलम-रेखा कहलाती है! यह रेखा दूपित प्रभाव ही स्पष्ट करती हैच ाहे *वि-परवेत'कितना ही शुभ और उच्च बयों न हो
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the line is like a half-crescent moon, surrounding the Sun Mount, then it is called the Sun Line or Vivlam Line. This line clearly shows a dual effect, indicating that even many good and high qualities are not present.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person with a mix of positive and negative qualities, indicating a lack of consistency and stability.

approved.original: रविहजोने् सेवर विल-पववय॑त क े_ गुणों काह ास ही होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Sun Line is associated with the qualities of a servant, indicating that the person is always ready to serve others.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is always willing to serve others, often sacrificing their own needs and desires.

approved.original: ऐसा व्यक्ति सदेव अपने कार्यों में मस- फल रहता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Such a person always remains in a state of mental satisfaction with their work.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is always satisfied with their work and life, indicating a sense of contentment and fulfillment.

approved.original: य्पि यह काय श्रेष्ठ करता है, परन्तु यश इसे नहीं मिलता, अपितु यह अधिकतर अपयक्ञ का ही भागी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Although this line makes the person excellent, they do not get success, but are mostly a part of failure.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is excellent in many ways, but struggles with success and often faces failure.

approved.original: रकि- पर्वत के सभी शुभ गुण, अशुभ गुणों में परिवर्तित हो जाते हैं,त पा ध्यक्ति जीवन में एक असफल व्यक्ति बनकर रह जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mount of Mars changes all its good qualities into bad qualities, and the person becomes a failed individual in life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person whose positive qualities are transformed into negative ones, leading to a life of failure and disappointment.

approved.original: * ऐसा व्यक्ति जीवन में सच्चरित्र रहते हुए भी कलंकित होता है, दुश्चरित्रता की निंदा और अपयश इसे भोगना पड़ता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Such a person, being a righteous person in life, is still tainted, suffering from the criticism and failure of their bad behavior.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is righteous and honest, but struggles with criticism and failure due to their own negative behavior.

approved.original: जीवन में इसे खिन्‍्त तथा दुःखी होते ही देखा गया है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This is seen in people who are unhappy and miserable in life.
approved.what_it_means: This line reveals a person's tendency to be unhappy and miserable in life, indicating a lack of fulfillment and satisfaction.

approved.original: (५) शुक्र-अलय--मग्रुरु भौर छानि-पर्चतों के छ्ीच में से निकेत- कर चाष की तरह होती हुई सूर्य-पर्वत था बरुध-पर्वत पर . समाप्त होनेवाली रेखा शुक़र-वलय कहलाती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A Shukr-Valay is a line that ends on the Sun Mount, resembling a crescent moon.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's creative and passionate nature, but also their tendency to be impulsive and reckless.

approved.original: तु जिन हाथों में यह रेखा देखी गई है, इसी अ्रकार से देखी गई है, फिर भी मह इससे भिन्न प्रकार बनती भी अनुभव में आई है, थो निम्नरूपेण है--- है (क) तजंनी उंगली से रेखा आरम्भ होकर गुर, शनि और सुर्य- पर्वत को घेरती हुई कनिष्ठिका उंगली प्र जाकर समाप्त होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In some hands, this line is seen in the same way, but it also takes a different form, as seen in the following way: (k) starting from the index finger, it passes through the Guru, Shani, and Sun mounts, and ends on the little finger.
approved.what_it_means: This variation of the Shukr-Valay line indicates a person's ability to balance their creative and intellectual pursuits with their emotional and spiritual needs.

approved.original: खत) तजंनी और मध्यमा के बीच मे सेनि कल अनामिका और कनिष्ठिका उंगलियों के बीच में जाकर समाप्त होनेवाली रेघा भी घुक्र-वलय कही णाती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: (kh) a line that ends between the index and middle fingers, or between the ring and little fingers, is also called a Shukr-Valay.
approved.what_it_means: This variation of the Shukr-Valay line indicates a person's tendency to be indecisive and uncertain, struggling to make decisions.

approved.original: ग) शुक्रवलय-रेखा वह भी कहलाती है, जो मात्र मध्यम बोर अंनामिका उँगली को घेरकर समाप्त हो भाती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: (g) a Shukr-Valay is also called a line that ends only around the middle and ring fingers.
approved.what_it_means: This variation of the Shukr-Valay line indicates a person's tendency to be overly focused on their relationships and social status.

approved.original: इन घार शुफ्र-मुद्राओं में सकेि सी-किसी व्यक्ित के हाथ में एक, दो, तीन तथा किसी-किस्ी के हाथ में तो ये चारों प्रकार की शुक्र मुद्राएं देघी गई हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In these four Shukr-Mudras, one, two, three, or all four types of Shukr-Mudras are seen in a person's hand.
approved.what_it_means: The presence of multiple Shukr-Mudras in a person's hand indicates their complex and dynamic nature, with multiple creative and intellectual pursuits.

approved.original: यह द्वृदय-रेखा की अनुपस्यिति मे उसका कार्य करती हैँ
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This Dwiday-Rakh works in the absence of the Dwiday line.
approved.what_it_means: The presence of the Dwiday-Rakh line indicates a person's ability to adapt and respond to changing circumstances, even in the absence of a clear direction or plan.

approved.original: शुक्र-बलय रफनेवाले व्यक्ति स्नायविक दु्बलताओं से ग्रस्त होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: People with a Shukr-Valay line are prone to nervous weaknesses.
approved.what_it_means: This line indicates a person's tendency to be anxious and stressed, with a weakened nervous system and a higher risk of nervous disorders.

approved.original: वे अधिकाधिक भौतिक्र टाइप के व्यक्ति होते जाते हैं, तथा विक्षिप्तता आदि रोगों से पीड़ित होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: They tend to be physically oriented individuals, and are prone to mental disorders. They may struggle with emotional instability.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency towards physical pursuits, but also their vulnerability to mental health issues.

approved.original: यदि यह शुफ-मुद्रा चौड़ी, गहरी तथा लाल रंग की हो तो स्पवित उपाजित द्रव्य समाप्त कर डालता ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Venus is broad, deep, and red, it indicates a person who can easily exhaust their vital energy.
approved.what_it_means: This feature warns of a person's tendency to exhaust their vital energy and resources.

approved.original: इसके विचार दूषित होते हैं, तथा प्रेम के सम्बन्ध में उतावली करनेवाला, कामी, व्यभिचारी तथा लम्पर होता है,प र अपनी लम्पटता को यह छुपाने में भी माहिर होता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The thoughts of such a person are tainted, and they are promiscuous, immoral, and adulterous, and skilled at hiding their immorality.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency towards promiscuity, immorality, and adultery.

approved.original: यदि घुक्र-मुद्रा कीर ेखा पतती और उचली हो तो व्यक्ति को ज्यादा नुकसान नहीं पहुँचता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Venus is seen to be receding and sloping, it causes less harm to the person.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests a person's tendency towards promiscuity may not cause them significant harm.

approved.original: ऐसे व्यक्तित समझदार, परिस्थितियों * को तुरन्त समझनेवाले, चतुर प्रेमी और वार्तालाप में माहिर होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Such individuals are intelligent, quickly understand situations, clever lovers, and skilled in conversation.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's intelligence, quick understanding, and skill in conversation and relationships.

approved.original: यदि एक से अधिक शुक्र-वलप पुरुष या स्त्री के हाथ में हों वो व्यक्ति (या स्त्री) निश्चय ही परस्त्रीगामी और लम्पट होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person or woman has more than one Mount of Venus, they are definitely promiscuous and immoral.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's tendency towards promiscuity and immorality.

approved.original: यदि शुक्र-मुद्रा हवटी हुई हो, तो व्यक्ति अपने से निम्न कुल की * स्त्रियों से प्रेम-सम्बन्ध रखता है, तथा दुष्कर्म करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Venus is sloping, the person has relationships with women of lower social class and commits atrocities.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency to engage in relationships with women of lower social class and commit atrocities.

approved.original: यह जीवन- भर अपने दुष्कृत्यो कफेल स्वरूप पछताता भो रहता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This person regrets their misdeeds throughout their life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's lifelong regret over their misdeeds.

approved.original: यदि शुक्र-मुद्रा आगे बढ़कर विवाह-रेखा को काठ दे, तो या तो व्यवित का विवाह होता नही, और होता भी है तो वैवाहिक जीवन सुखी नही रहता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If Shukra-Mudra crosses the marriage line, the person may not get married or their married life may not be happy. This indicates a challenging or unhappy marriage.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a potential for marital struggles or an unhappy marriage, indicating the need for extra effort to maintain a healthy relationship.

approved.original: ऐसी शुक्र-मुद्रा भाग्य-रेखा को कादे तो व्यक्ति भाग्यहीन, स्वास्थ्य-रेखा को काटे तो स्वास्थ्यहीन, तथा हृदय-रेखा को काठे वो व्यक्षित हृदम का रोगी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If Shukra-Mudra cuts the destiny line, the person is fateless; if it cuts the health line, they are unhealthy; and if it cuts the heart line, they are prone to heart disease.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who may be vulnerable to health issues, particularly heart problems, and may struggle with fate or destiny.

approved.original: ऐसी मुद्रा रखनेवाले व्यक्ति योव-विज्ञान के लेखक होते हैं, तथा भानसिक रति में आनन्द अनुभव करते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: People with this mudra are often authors of yogic science and experience joy in spiritual practices.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is likely to be knowledgeable about yogic science and may find spiritual practices fulfilling and joyful.

approved.original: (६) इगा-रेशा--यह रेखा पूरे हाथ मेंस र्वोत्कृष्ट मानी गई है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Iga-Rasha is considered the most excellent line in the entire hand.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person of exceptional quality, with a strong sense of purpose and direction in life.

approved.original: यह रेखा मंणिबन्यध ाच त्ध-प्वत से प्रारम्भ होकर घनुपाकार रूप धारण करती हुई मुघ-क्षेत्तर कप हुँचती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This line begins from the Mount of Jupiter and takes a triangular shape, merging with the Mount of Mercury.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person with a strong sense of ambition and a desire for knowledge, often leading to success and recognition.

approved.original: यह रेखा रखनेवाले ब्यग्ति साधारण घॉपड़ियों में जन्म लेकर राष्ट्रपति वा सेनाध्यक्ष तक के थदों पर पहुँचते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: People with this line are born in ordinary families but rise to become presidents or chiefs of staff.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who may have humble beginnings but has the potential to rise to high positions of power and authority.

approved.original: देश के सर्वोच्च पदों को भी ये प्राप्त कर सकने में सफल रहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: They are also successful in achieving the highest positions in the country.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is capable of achieving great success and recognition in their field, potentially reaching the highest echelons of power.

approved.original: जप्त-यात्रा इनके लिए घातवः कट्टी गई है, और जीवन में एक-दो वारये प्लघात से उसप्तते है, और वच जाते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Japt-Yatra is a journey of spiritual growth, and these individuals experience a few ups and downs in life, but ultimately become enlightened.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is on a spiritual journey, facing challenges and obstacles, but ultimately achieving spiritual growth and enlightenment.

approved.original: उमात्पे हासास्तास् मेरास्तास् तारास्तास्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If these lines cut the Bhagya Rekha, it is considered a sign of bad luck. If they merge with it, it is considered a sign of good luck.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's destiny and luck. If these lines cut the Bhagya Rekha, it may indicate bad luck, but if they merge with it, it may indicate good luck.

approved.original: मदि ये प्रभावश रेयाएँ शुक्र-र्यत से ऊपर उठ रही हों तो ब्यवित अधिक कामी, सम्पट तथा परत्त्रीयामो होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If these lines are rising above the Shukra-Rashi, the person will be more active, adventurous, and prone to extramarital relationships.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is restless, adventurous, and may have a tendency to engage in extramarital relationships.

approved.original: मंगरा-रंधा से ऊार उठ रही हों तो व्पगित को साहसी और रणप्रिय बता देती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mangal-Rashi is rising, it indicates a brave and warlike person.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who is courageous, bold, and may have a tendency towards conflict or competition.

approved.original: याज्रानरेणाएं--यात्रा-रैपाएँ वे होती हैं जोप रित्पितियाँ उत्पन्त कर व्यकित को यात्रा करने के लिए विवश कर देती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Yatra-Rashi are those lines that force a person to travel.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may be compelled to travel due to circumstances or destiny.

approved.original: कुछ याघा-रेताएँ स्पष्ट की जा रही हैं--- (क) मंगल-रेणा से निकलकर जीवन-रेया पर मिलनेवासी रेखा फम-से-कम सौ मील की यात्रा उस्त समय कराती है,ज य मध्यमा उँगली कि घासुन पर सफेद अर्द्धंचन्ध बना हो
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Some clear Yatra lines are being shown - (a) If a line from Mangal-Rashi meets the Life Line, it indicates a journey of at least 100 miles.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a significant journey or travel of at least 100 miles, which may be a turning point in the person's life.

approved.original: (स) गदि मध्यमा उंगली के सासूत पर सफेद पन्ध तीन माह तक लगातार रहे, और इन्द-क्षेत्र सरेे खा निकलकर रविन्पर्वत पर पहुँचती है तो व्यक्षित वायुयान से विदेशन्यात्रा करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: (c) If a white line is present on the root of the middle finger for three months, and the line from the head of the mount of Jupiter meets the line of Ravi, then the person travels by air.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may travel by air, possibly for work or leisure, and may have a connection to aviation or travel.

approved.original: (ग) शुक्र-पवंत से अर्देचन्द्राकार में कोई रेखा चन्द्र-पवंत पर जाती हो, तथा महीनेभर से मध्यमा उँगली पर सफेद चन्द्र बना रहे तो ख्यग्त जलयान से विदेश-यात्रा करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: (g) If a line from Shukra-Rashi meets the line of Chandra in an arc shape, and a white moon is present on the middle finger for a month, then the person travels by ship.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who may travel by ship, possibly for leisure or adventure, and may have a connection to the ocean or water.

approved.original: (घ) चन्ध-क्षेत्र पर कोर्र दो रेखाएँ मिलकर पंतालीस डिग्री का कोण बनाती हों वो व्यक्ति तीर्थ-्यात्राएँ कण्ता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: (h) If two lines on Chandra-Kshetra form an angle of 45 degrees, then the person is a pilgrim.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who may be drawn to spiritual or religious travel, and may have a strong connection to pilgrimage or spiritual journeys.

approved.original: विशञान -रेघाएं---सन्तान-रेधा (बरुध-परवेद से हटकर विवाह- रैला के ऊपर) को तरह यदि बुध-पव॑त पर पाँच खड़ी रेखाएँ हों तो ये रेखाएँ विज्ञान-रेखाएँ कहलाती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If five vertical lines are present on Budha-Rashi above the line of marriage, then these lines are called Science Lines.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who may have a strong connection to science, technology, or innovation, and may have a natural aptitude for these fields.

approved.original: मशोर, नषरी ढऔौर शदोर हों तो ब्यविर के मिद्र भीड़, मदसरदादी हपा समद पहने पर फोड़ दिषातेशाने होते ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Saturn is long and narrow, then the person has a tendency to be miserly and selfish. This can lead to difficulties in relationships and a lack of generosity.
approved.what_it_means: A long and narrow Mount of Saturn indicates a tendency towards selfishness and miserliness, leading to difficulties in relationships and a lack of generosity.

approved.original: पि पपमिशो हके ेपमोप ्ेओोंक कडाी मर रेध तूमों ३) प्रपद है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Head Line is straight and clear, then the person has a clear and focused mind.
approved.what_it_means: A straight and clear Head Line indicates a clear and focused mind, with good mental clarity and concentration.

approved.original: सदोष त्रिभुज राहुलक्षेत्र पर हो तो व्यक्ति अभागा तथा मठिविता से जीवन-निर्वाह करनेवाला होता ह

approved.original: प्लूटो-क्षेत्र पर निर्दोष त्रिभुज, हो तो ब्यक्ति की वृद्धावस्था सानन्‍्द व्यतीत होती है, पर सदोष त्रिभुज होने पर व्यक्ति बुढ़ापे में अत्यन्त कष्ट उठाता ह

approved.original: कस होने पर व्यत्रित वन्तर्राष्ट्रीय सुपातिप्राप्त ठग और घूर्ते होगा है

approved.original: में हाथ डालता है, सफलदा प्राप्त कर सेता है

approved.original: ऐसे सोग दूसरों की फस्जोरियों को समझने में माहिर होते हैं, तथा फिर उससे फायदा उठा लेते हैं! यदि सदोष त्रिभुज हो तो व्यवित ध्यापार में दिवालिया ह

approved.original: यह हपेली में कहीं पर भी शुभ नहीं कहा जाता, फिर भी बृहस्पति-क्षेत्र पर इसकी उपस्यिति शुभ कही गई है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This is not considered auspicious anywhere in the palm, but its presence on the Mount of Jupiter is considered auspicious.

approved.original: ऐसा व्यक्ति नेश्र-रोग से भी पीड़ित रहत/ है

approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who is anxious, fearful, and has a restless mind, often struggling with emotional turmoil.

approved.what_it_means: These markings can reveal a person's strengths, weaknesses, and potential, helping them navigate life's challenges.

approved.original: हक 20 |. १>-ुरुक्षेत्र परे यदि नक्षत्र का विक्ठ हो तो व्यक्त कौ निइचय ही अपने जीवन में दावित, 'अध िकार, पंद, कीति, बड़ाई और ख्मी प्राप्त होगी है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a star is formed on the Mount of Rahu, the person will achieve great power, authority, and success in life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for greatness, leadership, and recognition.

approved.simple_explanation: If the Mount of Mercury is well-developed, the person's skills and abilities will advance, leading to prestigious positions.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for intellectual growth, career advancement, and respected positions.

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the later part of life, they may also experience sudden wealth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for unexpected financial gains or success in their later years.

approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a star is formed on the Mount of Jupiter-Saturn, the person will be fortunate, have a good direction, be virtuous, have good qualities, and be famous.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for good fortune, virtue, and recognition.

approved.original: वृद्धावस्पा इन लोगो की शुर्भ नहीं कही जा सकती
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The age line is not visible in these people.

approved.original: है ३. सक्मी पोग--जिसके द,हिने हाथ मेंघ नुप, चक या माला का चिह्न सुशोमित हो, यह जीवव-भर लक्ष्मी भोगता है, तया बट्द लट्मी का स्वामी रहता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a person has a ring, dot, or rosary mark on the finger tips, they will enjoy wealth and prosperity throughout their life, and remain the master of their wealth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for financial stability, prosperity, and control over their resources.

approved.original: ३. प्रधात बोग--हयेली मेंस ूर्य रेखा निर्दोष होऋर मस्तका-रेखा से मिल रही हो, तथा मस्तक-रेया ऊपर उठकर गुर-पर्वत को छूती झो तथा इस प्रकार श्रेष्ठ चतु्मण बनता हो तो व्यत्ित देश का प्रघान--राष्ट्रपत्ति या प्रधानमन्त्री--बनता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the heart line is clear and meets the head line, and the head line rises to touch the Guru mountain, the person will become a great leader, such as a president or prime minister of the country.

approved.simple_explanation: Explain to the photographer to take the photo in such a way that both the major and minor lines are clearly visible.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates that the person values attention to detail and is able to see the subtleties in life.

approved.original: फोटो का कागज उत्तम कोटि का दानेदार होना घाहिएं, जिस- पर फीटो निर्दीप रूप में आ जाय
approved.simple_explanation: The photo paper should be of high quality and fine texture, so that the photo is clearly visible.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests that the person values quality and is willing to invest in good materials and resources.

approved.original: जहाँ तक मैं समझता हूँ, पोस्ट- कार्ड साइज का फोटो फलाफल के लिए उत्तम रहता है; इससे छोटा फोटो सूक्ष्म होने के कारण स्पष्ट रेजाएं नहीं उभार पाता
approved.simple_explanation: A post-card size photo is ideal for palmistry analysis as it provides clear details. Smaller photos may not show fine lines and patterns.
approved.what_it_means: A clear photo reveals the person's inner nature, strengths, and weaknesses, helping the reader understand their character and destiny.

approved.original: उपयुक्त तीनों पद़तियों में सकेो ई भी पद्धति अपनाकर अपने हाथ का चित्र हस्तरेखाविद्‌ कैपा स भेजा जा सकता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: By using the three methods, one can send a picture of their hand to a palmist, even if they are far away.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates the person's ability to adapt to new situations, their willpower, and their capacity to handle responsibility.

approved.original: पूरे भारत में बहुत ही फम ऐस्रे हस्तरेश्वाविद्‌ होंगे जो 88% रेसामों के माध्यम से जन्म-तारीय व समय निकालने में समर्प रा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There will be many palmists in all of India who will be devoted to determining birth stars and times through 88% of the methods.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's potential for spiritual growth, their connection to the universe, and their capacity for self-awareness.

approved.original: भुझे वहाँ बैठे पाँच-सात मिनट ही बीते होंगे कि एक साधु माता दिखाई दिया, जिसके पुरे घरीर पर एक लंगोदी के अलावा कोई पस्त्र भथूा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A sadhu appeared with a prominent Mount of Jupiter, indicating a strong sense of purpose and leadership. This feature suggests a person who is confident and ambitious.
approved.what_it_means: A prominent Mount of Jupiter reveals a person who is confident, ambitious, and has a strong sense of purpose. They are natural leaders, but may also be prone to arrogance.

approved.original: यह निर्मीक भाव से विना हिचकरियाहट के भेरे पास से आगे बढ़ गया | उनका चेहरा भव्य और देदीप्य था
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The person's Head Line was clear and unbroken, indicating a strong and radiant personality. This feature suggests a person who is confident and charismatic.
approved.what_it_means: A clear and unbroken Head Line reveals a person who is confident, charismatic, and has a strong sense of self. They are natural leaders, but may also be prone to pride.

approved.original: .* हि बहू साधु लगमग पचास कदम जाकर फिर लौटे भर हमारे प्राप्त आकर खड़े हो गए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Many sadhus came and stood before us. This suggests a person who is open to spiritual growth and is willing to learn from others.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a prominent Mount of Venus is open to spiritual growth and is willing to learn from others. They are empathetic and compassionate, but may also be overly sensitive.

approved.original: तुरन्त वे छठे, दोनों को प्रणाम किया, और वायुवेग से दिना छुछ कहे अपने मार्ग पर आगे बढ़ गये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Immediately, the two of them bowed to us and, with great speed, continued on their path.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a strong Fate Line is destined for greatness and is driven to achieve their goals. They are confident and self-assured, but may also be prone to recklessness.

approved.original: मुश्किल सतेी व-धार मिवट के घाद तो उवकी अता-पता तक न था
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There was no sign of difficulty or hardship in their path. This suggests a person who is resilient and able to overcome obstacles.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a prominent Mount of Saturn is resilient and able to overcome obstacles. They are practical and responsible, but may also be prone to pessimism.

approved.original: जन्म-संवत्‌ का शान--मध्यमा का मूल शनि-पर्वत है, तो हनी का मूल बृहृस्पति-पर्वेत है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The mount of life span is the mount of Saturn, and the mount of marriage is the mount of Jupiter.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for stability, discipline, and responsibility in their personal and professional life.

approved.original: श्ि-पर्वत पर जितनी छड़ी रेखाएं हों, उन्हें गिन लें
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Count the number of lines on the Mercury mount.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for communication skills, adaptability, and quick thinking.

approved.original: खड़ी रेखाएँ वे होदी चाहिए जो लम्बी, पतली, स्पष्ट और निर्दोषि हों, तथा जिनका मूल भध्यमा उँगली के तीसरे पोर की जड़ हो
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Upright lines should be long, thin, clear, and free from defects, and their base should be at the base of the middle finger.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for stability, clarity, and effectiveness in their thoughts and actions.

approved.original: इसी प्रकार बृहस्पति के पर्वेत पर भी जितनी ऐसी रेखाएँ हों, उन्हें भी गिन लें
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Count the lines on the Mount of Jupiter, similar to the lines on the Mount of Saturn. This helps in understanding the person's leadership qualities and decision-making abilities.
approved.what_it_means: A person with many lines on the Mount of Jupiter is likely to be a natural leader, but may struggle with decision-making and impulsiveness.

approved.original: इस प्रकार भ्रयत्न करने पर प्रेक्षक चाहे तो व्यक्ति फी जन्म कुण्दली, जन्मलग्न, जन्मकुण्डलो में ग्रहों की स्थिति तथा प्रहों के अंश तक ज्ञात किये जा सकते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: By following this method, an observer can determine a person's birth chart, ascendant, and planetary positions.
approved.what_it_means: Understanding a person's birth chart and planetary positions can reveal their strengths, weaknesses, and potential.

approved.original: आरम्भ में यह सब-कुछ जटिल लग सकता है, परन्तु अभ्यास करने पर सध्ट जन्मपत्र आध घंदे के अन्दर-अन्दर ज्ञात किया जा सकता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: At first, this may seem complex, but with practice, one can understand the intricacies of a birth chart.
approved.what_it_means: A person who understands the complexities of a birth chart can gain insight into a person's life path and potential.

approved.original: मावश्यकता हैप रिश्रम, लगन एवं अध्ययन की | यदि सच्ची लगन है, तो द्रनिया में छछ मी असम्भव नहीं है ४
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The need for hard work, dedication, and study is essential. If one has genuine determination, nothing is impossible in this world.
approved.what_it_means: A person with determination can overcome any obstacle and achieve their goals.

approved.original: पंचांगुलि देवी ठथा उसकी साधना के बारे मेंअ नेक प्राचीन प्रत्षों, अैन प्रन्थों एवं संस्कृत ग्रन्थों में विवेचन आया है, जिसमें कहा गया है कि यदि नियमपुर्वक व्यक्ति पंचांगुन्ि देवी की साधना करे, तो छीक्ष ही मविध्यदष्टा एवं भविष्यवक्ता गन जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There are many ancient scriptures and texts that discuss Panchangam and its rituals. If a person practices Panchangam regularly, they can become a skilled astrologer and prophet.
approved.what_it_means: A person who practices Panchangam can develop their skills as an astrologer and gain insight into the future.

approved.original: पंचांगुलि देवी ठथा उसकी साधना के बारे मेंअ नेक प्राचीन प्रत्षों, अैन प्रन्थों एवं संस्कृत ग्रन्थों में विवेचन आया है, जिसमें कहा गया है कि यदि नियमपुर्वक व्यक्ति पंचांगुन्ि देवी की साधना करे, तो छीक्ष ही मविध्यदष्टा एवं भविष्यवक्ता गन जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There are many ancient scriptures and texts that discuss Panchangam and its rituals. If a person practices Panchangam regularly, they can become a skilled astrologer and prophet.
approved.what_it_means: A person who practices Panchangam can develop their skills as an astrologer and gain insight into the future.

approved.original: कहते हैं कि पाइचात्प सामुद्रिक शास्त्री 'कौरों या 'विरो दच्पती बंधांगुलि देवी की साधना किया करते थे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: It is said that great palmists like 'Kaur or 'Viravati used to practice Panchangam rituals.
approved.what_it_means: Respected palmists have used Panchangam rituals in their practice.

approved.original: प्रसिद्ध हरररेखा-विद्वान्‌ श्री लक्ष्मीवारायण औ त्रिपाठी ने भी इस सत्य को स्वीकार किया १
approved.simple_explanation: The Heart Line is a vital line in palmistry that reveals a person's emotional nature, relationships, and overall well-being. It is said to be influenced by the heart chakra, which governs emotions and love.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Heart Line indicates a person's capacity for love, compassion, and emotional intelligence. It can also reveal their potential for romantic relationships and friendships.

approved.original: हस्त-रेखाओं की यह अधिष्ठात्ी देवी है, अतः जो हृत्तरेखा-विशेषज्ञ दोगा चाहते हैं,उ न्हे तो इस देवी की साधना अवश्यह ीक रनी चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This is the presiding deity of hand lines. Translation: Those who want to become experts in Heart Line should definitely practice the worship of this goddess.
approved.what_it_means: Worshipping the Goddess of Lines is believed to enhance one's knowledge and skills in palmistry, particularly in understanding the Heart Line.

approved.original: ध्यान--दओम परचागुलि महादेवी थी सीमस्धर शासने
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Mahadevi Chaguli was the queen of the Chaguli kingdom.
approved.what_it_means: Mahadevi Chaguli's presence in a person's palm is believed to indicate their connection to spiritual and royal energies, influencing their leadership qualities and spiritual growth.

approved.original: मधिष्ठात्री करस्यामी ज्क्ितः श्री त्िदशेशितुः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The ruler of the Mount of Venus is Shri Tidasheshith.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Venus is associated with love, relationships, and sensual pleasures. A well-developed Mount of Venus indicates a person's capacity for love and intimacy.

approved.original: अतः यह स्ञप्त है कि यह मन्त्र चमत्कारिक है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This mantra is miraculous. It is said to make the person an expert in palmistry and bring them great success in the world.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for greatness and their ability to achieve success in their chosen field.

approved.original: यदि इस मन्त्र के साध्यम से पंचांगुलि देवी की साधना की जाय, तो व्यक्ति श्रेष्ठतम हस्तरेखाविद्‌ बनफर * विश्व में कीतिलाभ करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If one practices the worship of Panchanguli Devi through this mantra, then the person becomes the best palmist and gains great benefits in the world.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for spiritual growth and their ability to gain knowledge and wisdom.

approved.original: एाष्ससंछानए ईश्वर में इस पूरे विश्व में णिम्न रूपम ेंआ पका निर्माग किया है, जहू कैबल आपका ही हुआ है ; ठीक उप्ती रूप में नेद ो कोई ओंद हुआ है, न है, गौर न द्ोगा ही
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The universe is a creation of the divine, and everything in it is interconnected. Nothing exists independently, and everything is part of a larger whole.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's understanding of the interconnectedness of all things and their place in the universe.

approved.original: अतः यह आपके हाथ में हैक िइ स विश्व मेभंा प अपना वया स्थान यवावें
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Therefore, in your hand, you have the entire universe and your place in it.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's awareness of their own strengths and weaknesses and their ability to navigate the world.

approved.original: यह आपमर तिभर है कि झीछता से बीतते हुए ध्ों का लाप किस अकार से नपयोग करते हैं, . किस प्रकार से आप अपना सार्ंणरय इस विश्व के जाय कर पाते हैं, और यह भी आपके हाथ में हैं कि इस गतिशील विश्ठ के साथ आप कितना और कित गति से आगे बढ़ पाते है जीवम आपके सामने है, प्रत्येक क्षण आपके सामने खुत्ता पडा है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This is how you live your life, how you use your time, and how you navigate the world. Your hand shows how you move forward in life and how you face challenges.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's approach to life, their ability to adapt to change, and their capacity to overcome obstacles.

approved.original: आप प्रत्येक क्षण का सह्ठी-यही उपयोग करें, प्रत्येक अवसर की अपयों मुट्ठी मेंब न्द करें, भौर काल की प्रत्येक धड़कन को आप अपने अनुबूल बनायें
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Use every moment, seize every opportunity, and make every heartbeat count.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests a person's ability to seize opportunities and make the most of every moment.

approved.original: शाप देखेंगे कि आपकी रेखाएं बदल रही हैं, ऊपर की औरद उठ रही हैं भौर सफलता के हायो जयमाता पहनने लिए उत्स
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: You will see that your lines are changing, and your fate is rising for success and glory.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for success and their ability to achieve their goals.

approved.term: Creative and Destructive Aspects of Life
approved.original: जीवन में प्रत्येक कार्य के दो पहलू है--पटला सृजनात्मक ओर दूसरा ध्वसात्मक
approved.simple_explanation: This concept teaches that every action in life has two sides: creative and destructive. It's up to the individual to use their creative potential and avoid destructive tendencies.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's ability to balance their creative and destructive energies, influencing their life's journey and relationships.

approved.original: यह आपपर निर्भर है कि आप सूजन करते हूंय ा घ्वंस ;ज ीवन की महत्त्वपूर्ण पड़ियों का छृजनात्मक उपयोग करती हू या ध्वसास्मक
approved.simple_explanation: This concept emphasizes the importance of using one's creative potential and avoiding destructive tendencies in life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates the person's ability to harness their creative energy and make wise choices, influencing their life's trajectory.

approved.original: आप चेतन हैं, जड़ नहीं ; सक्रिय हैं, तिप्किय नहीं; और सक्षिय का कर्त्तव्य है--हुए क्षण गतिशोल रहना, आगे बढ़ता: सन्‍न्ति थे पप पर अग्रसर होते रहता ! आप उठिये, सक्षिय बनिये, सुजतरत बयकर आगे वडिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: You are conscious, not stagnant; active, not passive; and your responsibility is to remain alert and move forward. You must rise, become active, and move forward with determination.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's sense of responsibility and their ability to progress in life, overcoming obstacles and challenges.

approved.original: हं, उंगलियाँ सफलता के द्वार खटखटा रही हैं : बापके चेहरे पर ताया भुलाश क फूलों की तरह मुस्छराहुट नाच रहो है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Ah, fingers are knocking on the doors of success; your face is smiling like flowers, dancing with joy.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates the person's potential for success and their ability to achieve their goals, accompanied by happiness and fulfillment.

approved.original: जितना जीवन, समय, ध्ाषित और श्रम ग्रापको मिला है, उयना ही लिकन, टेंगोर, टॉलस्टॉय, ईसा और गांधी को भी मिला चघां
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The amount of life, time, effort, and hard work that one has received is the same amount that great individuals like Lenin, Tolstoy, Jesus, and Gandhi also received.
approved.what_it_means: This feature suggests that the person's potential for success is not limited by their circumstances, and they can achieve great things with determination and hard work.
